---
name: auth-ui
description: 認証UI（ログイン・サインアップ）
---

Create an authentication UI.

Requirements:

- Centered card layout
- Logo area
- Email + password inputs
- Validation states
- Error message area
- Primary CTA button
- Secondary link (signup/login switch)

Accessibility:

- Proper labels
- aria-live for errors
- Keyboard navigable

Design:

- Clean SaaS aesthetic
- Subtle elevation
- Responsive

Return feature-based structure.
Code only.
